meta.honestyNote: A Circle Gateway settlement id is a batch UUID, NOT an EVM tx hash — it is never rendered as a /tx/ link. Only real 0x+64hex hashes (the Gateway deposit and the ERC-8004 identity/reputation writes) are linked to arcscan.

depositTx.label: Prior Gateway deposit (real on-chain tx; balance already funded)

gatewaySettlementId.label: Circle Gateway settlement/batch UUID (not an EVM tx; on-chain transfer settles when the batch flushes)

settlements.note: Live settlement: authorization accepted by the Circle Gateway facilitator; buyer Gateway balance debited. The batched on-chain transfer to the seller settles asynchronously.
